name: Don quixote | favorite person award
description:
Somehow i made a bot again sorry it took so long i got really sick and then had to deal with some really bad personal shit which is delt with now soooooo back to at least 2 bots a month or so on.

Either way I've been into project moon for a solid two years now and I'm surprised I haven't made a pm bot yet so we start with the best autistic rat first... Probably gonna make heathcliff next he's just hot.

Tw: potential yandere and generally clingy and obsessive autistic creature warnings.

This will have very little info on limbus company itself if I don't add a storybook (i may either make my own or just use a public one.)

ALSO HOW DO I DO A STORY BOOK!!!!
creator: Milkbottle
